args.sql:
SELECT stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna.omrade 
FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna, 
     kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune 
WHERE kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune.kommunenavn ILIKE '%Kristiansand%' 
  AND ST_Intersects(stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna.omrade, 
                    kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune.omrade);

SELECT stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna.omrade 
FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna, 
     kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune 
WHERE kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune.kommunenavn ILIKE '%Kristiansand%' 
  AND ST_Intersects(stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna.omrade, 
                    kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune.omrade);

SELECT stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna.omrade 
FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna, 
     (SELECT omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune 
      WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Kristiansand%') AS kristiansand_geom 
WHERE ST_Intersects(stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna.omrade, 
                    kristiansand_geom.omrade);
